raw_response_text:
<features>
- Flower color is deep purple/magenta.
- Petals are broad and radiate from the center.
- Center features prominent white-tipped stamens.
- Background is green foliage.
</features>
<kb>
- IF the flower has pink or purple petals with a radiating structure and prominent central stamens, THEN class is 81.
- IF the flower is bright yellow with distinct downward-hanging petals and upright standards, THEN class is 14.
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The target image shows a purple flower with radiating petals and central stamens, which matches the visual pattern of class 81 (the pink/white flowers). It does not match the yellow, structurally different flowers of class 14.
</rule_check>

<response>81</response>

raw_response_text:
<features>
- The flower is predominantly yellow.
- The flower has large, drooping petals (falls) and upright petals (standards).
- There is a distinct dark, fuzzy marking (beard) on the lower petal.
- The background consists of green foliage.
</features>
<kb>
- IF the flower is pink and white with radiating petals THEN class is 81.
- IF the flower is yellow with a beard-like marking on the petal THEN class is 14.
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The target image shows a yellow flower with a distinct dark marking on the lower petal, which matches the visual pattern of the examples labeled 14. It does not match the pink and white flower pattern of class 81.
</rule_check>

<response>14</response>
